summary.title: OmnipodKit support plus telemetry and security fixes
changes: A new "All Omnipod Types" option is available when adding a pump to support Omnipod pods.
Pod model (Eros vs. DASH) is selected when you activate a pod, not when adding the pump.
Existing OmniKit and OmniBLE users see no change unless they explicitly switch to the new driver.
Background telemetry pings are now correctly limited to once per day to stop repeated sends.
Build/release tooling dependencies were updated for security; this does not change shipped app behavior.
